usage: report_narrow_channel [-help] { -width <float> [-ignore_placement_blockage ] [-no_merge_channel_check ] [-direction {x y xy}] [-active_objects {macro macroHalo ioPad ioCell core fence hardBlkg softBlkg partialBlkg routeBlkg row}] }

options.name: -active_objects
options.description: {macro macroHalo ioPad ioCell core fence hardBlkg softBlkg partialBlkg routeBlkg row} Active objects for narrow channel checking. The default is "core macro macroHalo hardBlkg"

options.name: -direction
options.description: Control for narrow channel checking direction. It could be x, y, xy. The default is xy

options.name: -ignore_placement_blockage
options.description: Specify to ignore placement blockages when computing channel widths

options.name: -no_merge_channel_check
options.description: Specify to merge narrow channel error boxes into contiguous error box
